text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm at the Fan Fest because I heard Mejiro
McQueen was going to be at one of the events.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's our hugely popular segment, "What's in the
Box?"! And our next contestant is... right here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hello, everyone. How are you doing today?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
A member of the noble Mejiro family, it's Mejiro
McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Loads of people have expressed their desire to
see a high-class Umamusume's reactions! Can you
live up to their expectations?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Easily. No matter what happens, I shall handle it
in a calm, composed manner.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(Urgh! I know this is what the fans voted for, but
why would they choose such an absurd event?!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(So many other events are available and far more
respectable than this one!)

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Right then, let's get started! Brrring out the box!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: (Ahh, gracious me! Anything could happen now!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Eeeek, it's so cold! What on earth is this?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Is it alive?! There is no way you would put a living
creature in here, right?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen continues feeling inside the box
for a little while longer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I-it's no use, I can't do this! I don't care that
everyone voted for it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Please! Please, this once! Have mercy!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Geez, you're hopeless, huh? I can't believe konjac
jelly got you this shook up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wha... Konjac jelly?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That was a splendid spectacle, though! The way
the jelly made this young noble dance sure was
something!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Thanks for watching, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: K-konjac...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I was in a panic... over konjac jelly?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...That night, Mejiro McQueen has a dream about
being chased by a giant ball of konjac.

text_block_list.name: Child A
text_block_list.text: It's okay! Don't be scared!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: You can do it, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: E-everyone...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(That's right... The fans came here especially to
see me!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: (I will not be made the fool!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Rrrrrr... There!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: O-oh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Could this be... konjac jelly?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ohhhhh! You. Are. CORRECT! Way to go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Phew, thank goodness...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, what did you think? That was magnificent,
wasn't it?
choice_data_list: Yeah, great job figuring out what it was.
Yeah, great job figuring out what it was.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I was afraid at first because I thought it
was alive, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Then I heard the supportive cheers of my fans.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Once I decisively strengthened my grip, the
answer came easier than I expected.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm reminded again that the path forward is
opened by tackling challenges fearlessly.
choice_data_list: You have the fans to thank for that.
You have the fans to thank for that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, of course. I'm grateful to everyone for
always cheering me on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...That night, Mejiro McQueen enjoys a dish made
with konjac as she reflects on her gratitude
towards her fans.
